settings_audio_intro: Set the audio device and audio recording properties for Scrybe.
settings_model_intro: Configure advanced properties for the model being used.
settings_model_preset_help: Pick a known whisper.cpp model. Selecting a preset downloads (or reuses the cached copy) and activates it.
settings_model_location_help: Or point at a custom .bin file on disk.
settings_whisper_intro: Configure different parameters for the Whisper model.
settings_toggle_translate_desc: Translate the recorded audio to English
settings_toggle_suppress_blanks_desc: By disabling this, blank [BLNK] special tokens will be included in the output
settings_toggle_print_special_desc: Enable the internal whisper special tokens in the output
settings_toggle_print_progress_desc: Hook into the progress callbacks for the whisper model
settings_toggle_token_timestamps_desc: Timestamp the tokens coming out of the whisper model. Disabling this will result in some errors in the output such as duplications.
settings_toggle_single_segment_desc: Reduces the output of each transcript iteration to a single text segment
settings_toggle_split_on_word_desc: An internal whisper setting for splitting new tokens based on words
settings_toggle_tdrz_desc: Enable diarization which identifies the different speakers in the audio (currently unstable)
overlay_intro: Manage the look of the subtitles that will be shown on the overlay.
overlay_obs_help_suffix: as a browser source in OBS to show the subtitles
overlay_test_text: I'm an example of a subtitle, and how I will look on the overlay browser source.
about_intro: A toy subtitle program useful for providing subtitles to currently playing audio, or for integrating with OBS to provide subtitles to your stream.
